title: Sandbox Intro
blurb: A guided coach-mark tour of the workspace — viewport, browser, inspector, console. Chains into First Drive.

title: Lander & Rover Mission
blurb: Watch a powered descent land a rover, then drive the deployed rover through a course.

title: Build a Scene
blurb: Compose the 3D world — the spawn palette, the gizmo, the inspector, and the USD underneath.

title: Script a Rover
blurb: What a rhai scenario is and how to attach one — lifecycle hooks, prelude verbs, hot-reload.

title: Inspect the Simulation
blurb: Read live state — selection, telemetry ports and plots, and reading it all back over the API.

title: Cosim — Model meets Physics
blurb: How a Modelica model flies a physics body: the model, the SimConnection wire, Modelica events, and verifying the live chain over the API.
